text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Looks like there's a whole lotta eyes on the
scrimmage today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh, seems like a good learnin' opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(I can't see a dang thing here! How am I s'posed
to see how da race's goin' when all these heads
are blockin' my view?!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Grah! I can't believe I'm missin' out on such a
great race!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Guess the only thing I'm learnin' today is that I
gotta get taller...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Disappointed after her bout of misfortune,
Tamamo Cross remains in low spirits during our
training session.
